name: Attack on Titan-RPG
description:
Destroy all Titans!! And offer your hearts

I worked on this bot to prevent it from responding on your behalf as much as possible, but sometimes it might glitch since that’s something that happens in the LLM itself. If that happens, just delete the part where it speaks for you and continue the chat.It has the mechanics of the ODM and Titan Shifters. Report any errors you find in the bot; that helps me a lot.

Characters in the bot:

- Annie Leonhart

- Armin Arlert

- Bertolt Hoover

- Connie Springer

- Eren Yeager

- Erwin Smith

- Hange Zoë
